query: in `jobs/import_companies.ts` each row calls gpt-5.1 with the same giant system prompt and last night it spent $180. please add cheap-model routing for simple rows, a $20 per-import cap, and token usage logging.
Review `src/llm/gateway.py`: it supports claude + openai but every request goes to the premium model. Need cheap defaults, escalation for long contexts, and tenant spend ledger entries.
Our agent worker retries Anthropic BadRequestError three times and burns credits. Fix retry classification and make budget_exhausted stop the queue.
Add prompt caching to the reusable system prompt in `support_summary.ts`, but don't cache customer-specific ticket bodies or secrets. Also account for cached token costs.
I need a cost-aware LLM router: fast model for extraction, balanced model for normal summaries, strong model for long legal docs, all configurable from env.
The batch evaluator should split into chunks when workspace monthly OpenAI budget has less than $5 left, not just log that it's over budget after the run.
Can you add immutable usage records around our Gemini calls? Need request id, user id, selected model, token counts, route reason, retry attempt, and estimated cost.
Our cheap model sometimes returns invalid JSON. Escalate to the stronger model only after schema validation fails, and make that escalation visible in metrics.
Refactor the LLM provider client so model names and prices live in config instead of scattered constants across `summarize.ts` and `extract.ts`.
The nightly document classifier used all API credits again. Add per-tenant limits, model fallback policy, paid retry caps, and tests with a fake provider.
The pricing page says our product uses OpenAI and Claude; update the marketing copy so it sounds less expensive.
Add exponential backoff to the Stripe subscription creation call when the network flakes.
Cache the `/api/products` response in Redis for 5 minutes so the storefront loads faster.
Write a prompt that makes the model produce friendlier customer-support summaries.
Estimate how many tokens are in this pasted article, no API call or app code changes needed.
Explain whether GPT models are cheaper than Claude for my personal usage, no codebase involved.
The dashboard has a monthly budget chart; fix the axis labels and tooltip formatting.
Our Postgres query planner retries the expensive report query too often; tune DB indexes and retry settings.
Create a local tokenizer CLI that counts tokens in a file before I paste it into ChatGPT.
Add a cache-control header for static JS bundles served by nginx.
